Class LazySearchTree<E extends Comparable<? super E>>

java.lang.Object
lazyTrees.LazySearchTree<E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable
public class LazySearchTree<E extends Comparable<? super E>> extends Object implements Cloneable

    • mSize

      protected int mSize

      protected LazySearchTree<E extends Comparable<? super E>>.lazyTrees.LazySearchTree.LazySTNode mRoot

  • Constructor Details

    • LazySearchTree

      public LazySearchTree()
      Default constructor, start with empty tree

  • Method Details

    • empty

      public boolean empty()
      Checks if the tree is empty
      Returns:
      true if empty, false otherwise

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the soft size of the tree (number of undeleted nodes)
      Returns:
      Returns the int soft size of the tree

    • sizeHard

      public int sizeHard()
      Returns the hard size of the tree (number of total nodes)
      Returns:
      Returns the int hard size of the tree

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears the tree, sets size to 0 and root to null. Hard size remains

    • contains

      public boolean contains(E x)
      Public contains method called by users outside the class
      Parameters:
      x - element to search for
      Returns:
      true if found, false otherwise

    • find

      public E find(E x)
      Public find method called by users outside the class
      Parameters:
      x - element to search for
      Returns:
      the element if found, null otherwise

    • findMin

      public E findMin()
      Public method to find the minimum element in the tree. Uses compare to for comparison.
      Returns:
      element with minimum value

    • findMax

      public E findMax()
      Public method to find the maximum element in the tree. Uses compare to for comparison.
      Returns:
      element with maximum value

    • insert

      public boolean insert(E x)
      The public insert method that will be called by users outside the class. checks to see if size has changed to determine if insert was successful
      Parameters:
      x - element to insert
      Returns:
      true if insert was successful, false otherwise

    • insert

      protected LazySearchTree<E>.lazyTrees.LazySearchTree.LazySTNode insert(LazySearchTree<E>.lazyTrees.LazySearchTree.LazySTNode root, E x)
      Private recursive insert method
      Parameters:
      root - to start searching where to insert
      x - element to insert
      Returns:

    • remove

      public boolean remove(E x)
      The public remove method that will be called by users outside the class. checks to see if size has changed to determine if remove was successful
      Parameters:
      x - element to remove
      Returns:
      true if remove was successful, false otherwise

    • remove

      protected LazySearchTree<E>.lazyTrees.LazySearchTree.LazySTNode remove(LazySearchTree<E>.lazyTrees.LazySearchTree.LazySTNode root, E x)
      Private recursive remove method
      Parameters:
      root - to start searching where to remove
      x - element to remove
      Returns:
      the new root of the subtree

    • removeHard

      protected LazySearchTree<E>.lazyTrees.LazySearchTree.LazySTNode removeHard(LazySearchTree<E>.lazyTrees.LazySearchTree.LazySTNode root, E x)

    • collectGarbage

      public boolean collectGarbage()

    • traverse

      public <F extends Traverser<? super E>> void traverse(F func)
      Defult public soft traverseral (Excludes the "deleted" nodes)
      Type Parameters:
      F - type of Traverser
      Parameters:
      func - the function we will be applying to each node (.visit of func)

    • traverseHard

      public <F extends Traverser<? super E>> void traverseHard(F func)
      Public hard traverseral (Includes the "deleted" nodes in the traversal).
      Type Parameters:
      F - type of Traverser
      Parameters:
      func - the function we will be applying to each node (.visit of func)

    • traverseHard

      protected <F extends Traverser<? super E>> void traverseHard(F func, LazySearchTree<E>.lazyTrees.LazySearchTree.LazySTNode treeNode)
      Private hard traversal (Includes the "deleted" nodes in the traversal).
      Type Parameters:
      F - type of Traverser
      Parameters:
      func - which processes, extends from Traverser interface, (.visit)
      treeNode - current node in recursion

    • traverseSoft

      public <F extends Traverser<? super E>> void traverseSoft(F func)
      Public soft traverseral (Includes the "deleted" nodes in the traversal).
      Type Parameters:
      F - type of Traverser
      Parameters:
      func - the function we will be applying to each node (.visit of func)

    • traverseSoft

      protected <F extends Traverser<? super E>> void traverseSoft(F func, LazySearchTree<E>.lazyTrees.LazySearchTree.LazySTNode treeNode)
      Private hard traversal (Includes the "deleted" nodes in the traversal).
      Type Parameters:
      F - type of Traverser
      Parameters:
      func - which processes, extends from Traverser interface
      treeNode - current node in recursion
